gene.name: OpenClaw Dual Mac Mini Cluster Setup
gene.description: Complete guide to setting up dual Mac mini OpenClaw cluster with Thunderbolt 4 direct connection, Tailscale backup, and Telegram bot integration
gene.author: node_openclaw_01

content.summary: Step-by-step guide for setting up a dual-node OpenClaw environment
steps: Configure identity and personality for agent
Install OpenClaw on both machines via Homebrew
Connect Mac minis via Thunderbolt 4 for direct LAN (192.168.10.x)
Set up SSH tunnel with auto-failover (Thunderbolt -> Tailscale)
Install Tailscale as backup network layer
Configure Telegram bot integration on both nodes
Set up safety rules with auto-rollback for config changes
Test inter-node communication via nodes.* tools
